justification: Vibration/resonance massage tool for headache lacks any explicit fascial rationale despite reporting validated psychological instruments.
Fascia iliaca vs PENG anesthetic nerve blocks; outcomes are pain, quadriceps strength, and hip function, no psychological measure.
Finite-element biomechanical simulation of chiropractic manipulation; reports stress/displacement only, no emotional or psychological outcome.
Foot reflexology for lactation and post-cesarean pain; reflexology is not a fascia-targeting intervention and no validated psych outcome.
Review of biomaterial-assisted microRNA delivery in preclinical models; no human primary study and no psychological outcome.
Commentary on academic medicine department leadership; 'structural integration' is organizational, unrelated to fascia or emotion.
Scoping review of autologous-tissue sacrocolpopexy surgery; no original interventional data and no psychological outcome.
Psychometric validation of a limb-difference PROM; no fascial intervention applied and not an interventional design.
Neural progenitor cell transplants in opossum and rat models; animal study, not human.
Finite-element analysis of bone-setting manipulation for fractures; reports stress/displacement, no emotional or psychological outcome.
Anatomical discussion of fascial planes in colorectal surgery; no intervention on emotion and no psychological outcome.
Abdominal massage plus moxibustion for constipation; generic massage without fascial rationale, outcomes are disease-specific QoL not affect.
RCT of dry needling for myofascial pain reporting Beck Depression Inventory; myofascial framing and validated depression outcome plausibly meet criteria.
Free flap with vascularized fascia lata for knee reconstruction; surgical outcomes only, no psychological measure.
Randomized crossover of self-myofascial release measuring HRV and reduced cardiovascular stress reaction; fascial intervention with physiological affect markers.
Case report of multimodal PT including myofascial release; outcomes are pain, disability, strength, no validated psychological measure.
Latissimus dorsi flap donor-site morbidity study; DASH/SPADI/Pedia-ASES are functional scores, no emotional or psychological outcome.
Commentary on MBSR mindfulness for student mental health; no fascial intervention and no original interventional data.
Surface EMG study of plantar fascia windlass activation during squats; outcomes are muscle activity, no psychological or affect measure.
OMT including myofascial release for dizziness; Dizziness Handicap Inventory captures emotional consequences, cannot confidently rule out.
